docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MISSIRLIAN, DONALD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARKUS, GREG PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,215.34 FILED BY MISSIRLIAN, DONALD AS TO DEFENDANT ARKUS, GREG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED SEP-23-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARKUS, GREG

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF DONALD MISSIRLIAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREG ARKUS IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT GREG ARKUS IS NOT THE CORRECT ENTITY TO BRING A CASE AGAINST. COURT DISMISSES PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
